candidate_check.description: The macOS system must disable Internet Sharing.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the macOS system is configured to disable Internet Sharing with the following command:

/usr/bin/osascript -l JavaScript << EOS
$.NSUserDefaults.alloc.initWithSuiteName('com.apple.MCX')\
.objectForKey('forceInternetSharingOff').js
EOS

If the result is not "true", this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the macOS system to disable Internet Sharing by installing the "com.apple.MCX" configuration profile.
title: The macOS system must disable Internet Sharing.
